human_signoff.notes: Manifest asset is still the deterministic generated box. The golden contract fixture at tests/fixtures/galley_1000_contract_box.glb pins the generator's output byte-for-byte. Replacing this manifest asset with real cabinet art requires flipping generated_fixture_replaced and production_art to true, recording a reviewer, following tools/blender/EXPORT_REAL_ASSET.md, and re-running python tools/blender/check_asset_ready.py with the new GLB.
